reviewer.nothingToStudy: Nothing to study in this deck right now — no due or new cards.
reviewer.deckLoadError: Something broke while loading this deck. Try again in a moment.
reviewer.notConnectedOpenAnki: Anki isn't connected. Open Anki on your computer and try again.
reviewer.noDecks: No decks to review yet. Sync a Notion page to start building cards.
reviewer.pickDeck: Pick a deck to study its due and new cards without opening Anki.

flash.needsDecision: Needs a decision — see banner above
flash.updateFailed: Couldn't update. Try again in a moment.

subscriptions.offlineError: Anki client offline — will retry next tick
subscriptions.lastCheckFailed: Last check failed — we'll try again soon
subscriptions.ankiWebFailed: Couldn't reach AnkiWeb. Open Anki, sign in, then try again.
subscriptions.advancedSummary: Can't find it? Paste a Notion link instead.
subscriptions.checkInterval: Checks Notion for changes every 5 minutes.
subscriptions.preparingFirstSync: Preparing your first sync — usually under a minute.
subscriptions.deckLocationHelp: Use :: to nest. New cards land here; cards you already moved stay put.
subscriptions.saveLocationError: Couldn't save the deck location. Try again in a moment.
subscriptions.zeroScannedSuffix: blocks and didn't recognize any cards. Ankify looks for toggles, Q&A pairs, and bullets.
subscriptions.zeroNoContent: We couldn't read any content from this page.
subscriptions.zeroSamplesSummary: What we saw on this page (first {{count}})

flash.saveError: Couldn't save. Try again in a moment.
flash.deleteError: Couldn't delete. Try again in a moment.
flash.updateError: Couldn't update. Try again in a moment.

leeches.notConnected: Anki isn't connected. Open Anki on your computer and try again.
leeches.empty: No leeches yet. Anki flags a card after you fail it 8 times in review.
leeches.helper: Cards you keep forgetting. Anki suspends a card after 8 lapses — fix it or let it go.
leeches.tooManyFields: This card has more fields than Front and Back. Open it in Anki to edit safely.

conflicts.offlineMessage: Anki isn't connected right now. Open Anki and try again.
conflicts.heading: Which one do you want to keep?
conflicts.lead: You changed this flashcard in Notion, and also in Anki. We can only keep one.

workspace.confirmShutdownBody: Your collection stays safe in AnkiWeb.
workspace.syncErrorStatus: Couldn't reach AnkiWeb. Try again in a moment.

pagePicker.noMatch: No pages match "{{query}}". Make sure the page is shared with 2anki.
pagePicker.emptyPrefix: No pages yet. Share one with 2anki from your
pagePicker.setRulesAria: Set rules for {{title}} before making a deck
pagePicker.setRulesTitle: Set conversion rules before making a deck

databasePicker.label: Pick a different tracker
databasePicker.missingColumns: This database is missing the Date or Reviews column 2anki needs. Sending will fail until those columns exist.
databasePicker.makeFresh: Make a fresh tracker for me
databasePicker.savedNotInList: Saved tracker isn't in your current Notion list. It still works — if it doesn't, re-share the database with 2anki in Notion.
databasePicker.advancedSummary: Don't see your database? Paste an ID instead.
databasePicker.advancedPlaceholder: Paste from your Notion database URL

trackerPicker.title: Where should we put it?
trackerPicker.hint: We'll add a small Notion database under the page you pick. Only pages you've shared with 2anki show up here.
trackerPicker.noMatch: No pages match "{{query}}". Make sure the page is shared with 2anki in Notion.
trackerPicker.emptyList: No Notion pages here yet. In Notion, open a page and choose ··· → Connections → 2anki.

export.firstRunLead: We'll create a Notion database called "Anki review tracker" with three columns: Date, Reviews, Time spent (min). Two short steps.
export.heading: Where does your study history go?
export.lead: Each day's review count and time spent show up as a row in a Notion database you control.
export.allFailed: None of your {{count}} days could be updated.
export.missingColumns: This tracker is missing the Date or Reviews column. The fastest fix is a fresh tracker — we'll make it.
export.alreadyHaveOne: I already have one — pick from a list
export.trustNote: We only add new days. Existing rows are never overwritten.
export.confirmHint: We'll add a Notion database called "Anki review tracker" with three columns: Date, Reviews, Time spent (min). Each day's count becomes one row. Nothing else on your Notion page changes.

stats.noReviews: No reviews yet. Study a deck in Anki and your activity shows up here.
stats.notConnected: Anki isn't connected right now. Your stats will load when it reconnects — usually within a few minutes.
stats.heatmapSummary: Review activity over the past year: {{streak}}-day streak, {{reviews}} reviews this year

page.welcomePrefix: You're synced. We added two note types in Anki,
page.historyGoesTo: Study history goes to a Notion database.

setup.startHint: We'll start a private Anki for you. Takes a few seconds.
setup.startError503: Anki couldn't start — usually a temporary infra issue. Try again in a moment. If it keeps failing, email support@2anki.net.
setup.startError: Anki couldn't start. Try again, or email support@2anki.net.
setup.takingLonger: Anki is taking longer than expected.
setup.mostRetriesSucceed: Most retries succeed. If it keeps failing, email support@2anki.net.
setup.restartError: Anki couldn't restart. Try again, or email support@2anki.net.
setup.signInHintAfter: in the toolbar, then enter your AnkiWeb email and password. After that, we keep AnkiWeb up to date whenever a Notion page changes.
setup.cantReach: Can't reach Anki right now. Try again in a few seconds.
setup.notSignedInBefore: We don't see you signed in to AnkiWeb yet. Open Anki, click
setup.notSignedInAfter: in the toolbar, enter your AnkiWeb email and password, then come back and try again.
setup.checkError: Couldn't check your sign-in. Try again in a moment.
setup.moveOnAuto: We'll move on automatically once AnkiWeb is linked.
setup.restartAnkiError: Couldn't restart Anki. Try again, or email support@2anki.net.
setup.takeoverTitle: Set up Anki in your browser.
